title: N/A
company: EU Delegation to Nigeria and ECOWAS
raw_text:
- $700 monthly stipend
- ⁠Only open to those in Abuja
- ⁠You must have less than 1 year professional experience.

For the 6 months traineeship, you’d make $4,200 equivalent to almost N6m

Apply or send to someone you know in Abj

https://www.eeas.europa.eu/delegations/nigeria/funded-traineeship-young-graduates-eu-delegation-federal-republic-nigeria-and-ecowas_en
